dimension_notes.naming_quality: Improved: w_ratio/q_ratio aliases follow snake_case convention. _resolve_score_fn, resolve_scorer, ScorerProtocol all Pythonic.
dimension_notes.logic_clarity: Greatly improved: resolve_scorer eliminates 4x duplication. Reranker _resolve_score_fn has documented dispatch with clear early returns.
dimension_notes.type_safety: Protocol types (ScorerProtocol, RerankerProtocol, EmbeddingCallback). resolve_scorer typed. Self for from_column. Remaining: PyO3 objects as Any.
dimension_notes.contract_coherence: Self return for from_column. Protocol types define interfaces. _resolve_score_fn documents dispatch contract.
dimension_notes.error_consistency: All from e chains preserved. RuntimeError for missing index. ValueError for explain misses. Consistent patterns.
dimension_notes.abstraction_fitness: _BaseBM25 with 25 methods. Protocol types define scorer/reranker/embedding interfaces. _coerce_corpus handles all input types.
dimension_notes.ai_generated_debt: Minimal: base class, resolve_scorer, Protocol types, _resolve_score_fn eliminate all formulaic patterns.
dimension_notes.high_level_elegance: Clean: base class pattern, Protocol interfaces, centralised _types.py. Reranker dispatch well-documented.
dimension_notes.mid_level_elegance: Strong: resolve_scorer dedup, _resolve_score_fn replaces hasattr chain, _blend_reranked_scores extracted. Clean DRY code.
dimension_notes.low_level_elegance: Rust editops hoisted. Python code clean. _resolve_score_fn uses early returns instead of elif chain.
dimension_notes.cross_module_architecture: _types.py single source for types, protocols, helpers. No cross-module duplication.
dimension_notes.initialization_coupling: add/remove_documents rebuild entire index. Inherent to BM25 structure. Documented.
dimension_notes.convention_outlier: Improved: w_ratio/q_ratio aliases added. BM25Algorithm vs BM25Variant differences documented.
dimension_notes.dependency_health: Clean: from e chains. Optional deps lazy-imported. Protocol types stdlib-only.
dimension_notes.test_strategy: 66 parametrized BM25 variant tests + 10 langchain tests. Total 610. Strong coverage.
dimension_notes.api_surface_coherence: Protocol types define interfaces. w_ratio/q_ratio aliases. BM25Algorithm documented.
dimension_notes.authorization_consistency: N/A - library. langchain lazy class tested.
dimension_notes.incomplete_migration: _Result/_MetaResult aliases remain for backward compat. All new code imports from _types.
dimension_notes.package_organization: _types.py centralises shared concerns. Modules well-separated. Could split search.py into sub-package.
dimension_notes.design_coherence: Improved: _types.py central. Reranker dispatch documented. search.py ~1000 lines but well-structured.

issues.summary: Internal helpers use _ prefix but some like _search_query could be module-private
issues.suggestion: Consider renaming or restructuring module-private helpers.

issues.summary: Internal Rust index objects typed as Any
issues.suggestion: Limited by PyO3 — consider TYPE_CHECKING guard with stub.

issues.summary: Reranker model_or_callable still typed as Any instead of Protocol
issues.suggestion: Define RerankerModel Protocol with optional predict/score methods.

issues.summary: search.py contains BM25 + HybridSearch + Reranker
issues.suggestion: Split into search/ sub-package.

issues.summary: Editops backtrace allocates strings per operation
issues.suggestion: Use enum instead of string for op type.

issues.summary: add/remove_documents rebuild entire Rust index
issues.suggestion: Document rebuild cost in docstrings.

issues.summary: No hypothesis property-based tests for fuzzy invariants
issues.suggestion: Add hypothesis tests for symmetry and bounds.

issues.summary: BM25Algorithm and BM25Variant use different casing
issues.suggestion: Document differences.

issues.summary: extractBests uses camelCase while other process functions use snake_case
issues.suggestion: Add extract_bests alias.

issues.summary: embed_anything error message could mention the specific model that failed
issues.suggestion: Include model_id in the error message.

issues.summary: Provider shortcuts dict could be a frozen enum or NamedTuple
issues.suggestion: Acceptable for now — dict is flexible for runtime additions.

issues.summary: HybridSearch _coerce_corpus duplicates some compat.py logic
issues.suggestion: Acceptable: _coerce_corpus extends compat.py with Document support.

issues.summary: BM25 variant __reduce__ methods share similar pattern
issues.suggestion: Acceptable for pickle compat — each variant has different constructor args.

issues.summary: Reranker wraps scoring failures in RuntimeError losing type specificity
issues.suggestion: Consider a custom RerankError exception.

issues.summary: engine.py imports many symbols from search.py
issues.suggestion: Could use facade but current coupling is acceptable for module size.

issues.summary: Adaptive blend variance calculation could use statistics module
issues.suggestion: Consider statistics.variance for clarity.

issues.summary: Reranker.rerank has inline blending that could use _blend_reranked_scores
issues.suggestion: Consolidate blending logic into single helper.

issues.summary: _Result/_MetaResult aliases remain
issues.suggestion: Plan deprecation cycle.

issues.summary: All modules at package root
issues.suggestion: Could reorganize into sub-packages.

issues.summary: langchain.py uses module __getattr__ for lazy class
issues.suggestion: Document pattern in module docstring.
